conflict: Formal inquiry, legal self-protection, and the knowledge that institutions mutate even when one concession falls.
consequence: Marisol turns sabotage into witness by naming exactly how the trains were maintained and broken, while the line is stopped but not historically undone.
must_land_beats: Make the deposition precise about mechanisms, not just moral outrage.
Show the concession's loss as meaningful but partial.
Use the first rain and the rusting cars as material change, not decorative symbolism.
End on witness that resists redemption language.
pressure_source: Formal inquiry, legal self-protection, and the knowledge that institutions mutate even when one concession falls.
state_shift: Marisol turns sabotage into witness by naming exactly how the trains were maintained and broken, while the line is stopped but not historically undone.
